tasks.subject: Task 1: Orchestrator instance= + tags= kwargs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** deploy_session and generate accept new `instance: Instance | None = None` and `tags: dict[str, str] | None = None` kwargs. Supplied instance short-circuits internal create_instance (Q1); caller tags= merges over orchestrator built-ins {kinoforge_engine, kinoforge_key} on the cold path (Q6). CapabilityMismatch and ValidationError teardowns skip destroy_instance when instance= was caller-supplied (Q2, Q5). Trust caller as-is, no get_instance refresh (Q4). Also wire tags= into deploy()'s _build_spec for future CLI parity.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:225 (Callable already imported), :273-345 (_provision_instance_and_build_backend +tags= param + merged_tags block), :394-466 (deploy_session signature + kwarg branches), :507-548 (cache-miss / cache-hit branches), :555-564 (CapabilityMismatch teardown guard), :679-694 (deploy() _build_spec merge), :734-869 (generate signature + threading + ValidationError teardown guard)
- Modify: tests/core/test_orchestrator.py (+8 tests + _InstanceSupplyProvider(LocalProvider) spy + _CountingProfileProvider + _MismatchingProfileProvider + _RaisingValidateSpecFakeEngine helpers near existing _OfferRetryProvider ~line 1192)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- deploy_session(instance=existing) does NOT call provider.find_offers or provider.create_instance
- deploy_session(instance=existing) still calls engine.provision(existing, cfg_dict) (idempotent via Layer I marker)
- deploy_session(instance=existing) builds backend via engine.backend(existing, cfg_dict)
- With instance=existing AND empty profile cache: engine.provision + profile_provider.discover BOTH run; provider.create_instance does NOT
- CapabilityMismatch mid-session with instance=existing re-raises WITHOUT calling provider.destroy_instance
- ValidationError in generate(instance=existing) re-raises WITHOUT calling provider.destroy_instance
- generate(instance=existing) threads kwarg through to deploy_session (downstream create_instance not called)
- deploy_session(tags={k:v}) (no instance=) merges caller tags onto orchestrator-built InstanceSpec.tags; tags['kinoforge_engine'] + tags['kinoforge_key'] still present
- deploy_session(tags={k:v}, instance=existing) leaves supplied instance's tags untouched; tags kwarg ignored

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k 'supplied_instance or threads_instance or threads_tags or tags_ignored'

**Steps:** Write 8 failing tests + helper spies (RED) -> implement deploy_session signature + cache-miss branch + cache-hit branch + CapabilityMismatch guard + _provision_helper tags param + deploy() _build_spec merge + generate signature + threading + ValidationError guard (GREEN) -> full test_orchestrator.py no regression -> typecheck + lint + pre-commit -> commit. See plan §Task 1 for full HEREDOC test + impl bodies.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k 'supplied_instance or threads_instance or threads_tags or tags_ignored'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deploy_session(instance=existing) skips find_offers + create_instance", "deploy_session(instance=existing) still calls engine.provision (idempotent via marker)", "deploy_session(instance=existing) builds backend via engine.backend(existing, cfg_dict)", "instance= + empty cache: engine.provision + profile_provider.discover both run; create_instance does not", "CapabilityMismatch with instance= re-raises WITHOUT destroy_instance", "ValidationError in generate(instance=) re-raises WITHOUT destroy_instance", "generate(instance=) threads kwarg to deploy_session", "deploy_session(tags=) merges caller tags onto built-in {kinoforge_engine, kinoforge_key}", "tags= ignored when instance= supplied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Batch parity — batch_generate(instance=, tags=)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** batch_generate threads instance= and tags= through to deploy_session. Same warm-reuse semantics as generate, applied once per batch (one shared instance amortises across all entries).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/batch.py:428-547 (signature + deploy_session call; add `from kinoforge.core.interfaces import Instance` if missing)
- Modify: tests/core/test_batch.py (+1 test reusing _InstanceSupplyProvider + _CountingFakeEngine + _make_premade_instance from test_orchestrator.py via cross-import or shared conftest)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- batch_generate(instance=existing) does NOT call provider.create_instance
- batch_generate threads tags= kwarg through to deploy_session
- All existing batch tests still pass

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_batch.py -v -k 'supplied_instance'

**Steps:** Write 1 failing test (RED) -> add instance= + tags= to batch_generate signature -> thread into deploy_session call -> ensure Instance import (GREEN) -> full test_batch.py no regression -> typecheck + lint + pre-commit -> commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/batch.py", "tests/core/test_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_batch.py -v -k 'supplied_instance'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["batch_generate(instance=existing) skips provider.create_instance", "batch_generate threads tags= through to deploy_session", "all existing batch tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Smoke rewire — warm-reuse via orchestrator kwargs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live smoke deletes manual `if not warm:` block (manual find_offers/create_instance/poll_ready); calls orchestrator.generate(instance=existing, tags={...}) unconditionally. Phases 3-5 (find_offers/create_instance/poll_ready) collapse into a single phase=generate marker. Cold path recovers the orchestrator-created pod handle via post-generate find_instance_by_tag so the destroy block works.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py:184-268 (delete the `if not warm:` block) + :296-305 (generate() call adds instance=instance + tags={...}) + add 8-line post-generate cold-path pod recovery via find_instance_by_tag

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Smoke deletes the `if not warm:` block (find_offers + create_instance loop + poll_ready)
- Smoke unconditionally passes instance=existing + tags={...} to orchestrator.generate
- Tags dict includes _TAG_KEY: _TAG_VALUE, mode: pod, kinoforge.git_sha: _git_sha()
- Cold-path pod recovered via provider.find_instance_by_tag after generate returns so destroy block has pod_id
- pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only reports collected-and-skipped without live env vars
- pixi run lint + pixi run typecheck clean

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint

**Steps:** Locate `if not warm:` block + generate() call -> delete block + add instance= + tags= kwargs to generate call -> add cold-path pod-handle recovery via find_instance_by_tag -> verify collection + lint + typecheck -> pre-commit + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_comfyui_wan_live.py --collect-only -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke deletes manual find_offers/create_instance/poll_ready block", "smoke unconditionally passes instance= + tags= to orchestrator.generate", "cold-path pod recovered via find_instance_by_tag post-generate", "collection green + skip-without-env preserved", "lint + typecheck clean"]}
```
